topics.name: Abstract Ideas
topics.description: General abstract concepts such as ability, reason, idea, cause, effect, state, quality, or condition when the word is not tied to a more specific domain.

topics.name: Animals
topics.description: Animals, insects, pets, wildlife, and animal-related vocabulary.

topics.name: Art & Creative Work
topics.description: Visual art, design, creativity, performance, and general artistic production outside music.

topics.name: Body & Physical Actions
topics.description: Body parts, senses, physical processes, and words directly tied to the human body or bodily function.

topics.name: Business & Commerce
topics.description: Companies, management, trade, deals, customers, services, markets, and commercial activity beyond everyday shopping.

topics.name: Communication & Language
topics.description: Speaking, listening, asking, answering, agreeing, refusing, reporting, writing, reading, and other language or interaction vocabulary.

topics.name: Education & Learning
topics.description: Learning, teaching, school, study, knowledge acquisition, training, and academic contexts.

topics.name: Emotions & Feelings
topics.description: Feelings, moods, attitudes, emotional reactions, and words used to describe mental or emotional states.

topics.name: Entertainment & Leisure
topics.description: Theater, cinema, games, hobbies, leisure activities, performances, shows, and fun.

topics.name: Environment
topics.description: Environment vocabulary and closely related concepts that belong to this semantic area rather than a broader generic topic. Common triggers include waste.

topics.name: Family & Relatives
topics.description: Family members, kinship, marriage, parenting, and household relationships.

topics.name: Food & Cooking
topics.description: Food, meals, ingredients, cooking methods, drinks, taste, and kitchen vocabulary.

topics.name: Grammar & Function Words
topics.description: Articles, prepositions, auxiliaries, pronouns, conjunctions, particles, determiners, and other function words that mainly express grammar rather than a concrete subject area.

topics.name: Health & Medicine
topics.description: Illness, treatment, medical care, fitness, condition, recovery, and healthcare-related vocabulary.

topics.name: Home & Household
topics.description: Homes, rooms, furniture, household objects, domestic routines, and everyday living spaces.

topics.name: Internet & Online Life
topics.description: Websites, online communication, digital platforms, email, social media, downloading, uploading, and internet-specific vocabulary.

topics.name: Law & Crime
topics.description: Rules, rights, police, courts, legal processes, crime, punishment, and justice vocabulary.

topics.name: Measurement & Size
topics.description: Length, weight, volume, scale, degree, units, dimensions, and ways of measuring things.

topics.name: Media & Publishing
topics.description: News, journalism, television, radio, books, publishing, and mass communication channels.

topics.name: Money & Finance
topics.description: Money, prices, payment, cost, banking, financial value, and economic vocabulary.

topics.name: Movement & Position
topics.description: Direction, location, position, motion, entering, leaving, rising, falling, and spatial relations not limited to vehicles.

topics.name: Music
topics.description: Songs, instruments, rhythm, singing, listening to music, and music performance vocabulary.

topics.name: Nature & Environment
topics.description: Land, plants, landscapes, natural places, ecology, and the physical environment outside built spaces.

topics.name: Numbers & Counting
topics.description: Numbers, quantities, order, counting, amounts, and basic numeric expressions.

topics.name: People
topics.description: Persons, social roles, identity, age groups, relationships between people, and human-centered vocabulary that is not more specifically about family, emotions, or communication.

topics.name: Politics & Government
topics.description: Government, elections, policy, political systems, public authority, and state-level decision making.

topics.name: Religion
topics.description: Religion vocabulary and closely related concepts that belong to this semantic area rather than a broader generic topic. Common triggers include hell.

topics.name: Safety
topics.description: Safety vocabulary and closely related concepts that belong to this semantic area rather than a broader generic topic. Common triggers include warn.

topics.name: Science & Research
topics.description: Scientific concepts, research, experiments, evidence, analysis, and academic science contexts.

topics.name: Shopping & Buying
topics.description: Stores, buying, selling, products, orders, consumer choices, and everyday retail situations.

topics.name: Society & Community
topics.description: Public life, community, social systems, culture, institutions, and group-level human activity.

topics.name: Sports & Exercise
topics.description: Games, competition, training, exercise, physical sport activity, and athletics vocabulary.

topics.name: Technology & Devices
topics.description: Machines, tools, devices, computing hardware, software, engineering technology, and technical equipment.

topics.name: Time & Dates
topics.description: Clock time, dates, frequency, duration, sequence, schedules, and expressions about when something happens.

topics.name: Transport & Vehicles
topics.description: Cars, buses, trains, planes, roads, traffic, driving, transport systems, and movement by vehicle.

topics.name: Travel & Trips
topics.description: Journeys, tourism, routes, destinations, travel planning, accommodation, and being away from home.

topics.name: Weather & Climate
topics.description: Rain, wind, sun, temperature, seasons, forecasts, and climate conditions.

topics.name: Work & Jobs
topics.description: Employment, professions, workplaces, tasks, career activity, office contexts, and general job-related vocabulary.
